channel.title: Classification on Dario Arcos-Díaz, PhD
channel.description: Recent content in Classification on Dario Arcos-Díaz, PhD

item.title: Classifying brain regions from gene expression RNA-seq data
item.description: I trained an XGBoost classifier on GTEx bulk RNA-seq to distinguish 13 brain regions. It got 95% accuracy, and the top identified genes are also known tissue markers in neuroscience.

item.title: Personalized Medicine Kaggle Competition
item.description: This was my approach to the Personalized Healthcare Redefining Cancer Treatment Kaggle competition. The goal of the competition was to create a machine learning algorithm that can classify genetic variations that are present in cancer cells.
